text: I am Amen Hany. A Computer Engineer, Game Developer, and Web Developer.
I have loved computers and tinkering with technology and software since I was a kid. Which means I have grown very accustomed to finding solutions for some
bugs as I have had to deal with them basically my entire life (especially dealing with a Windows + AMD GPU + Intel CPU Combo :I)

I have made countless projects, programming and non-programming related, even outside the ones shown on this portfolio. They are mostly smaller things I use for my digital quality of life, but the ones I decided to showcase here are the more official/larger projects I have made.

Some of the projects shown (and not shown) are team based, and for all of them I am the leader of the team to ensure a solid, clean structure for our projects because I can not work with spaghetti code (despite what our game jam team's name might imply)
For my certifications and achievements, my team won the 1st place in the
in Egypt. I also placed 6th in my university's Competitive Programming Contest
Anyways, I won't keep you for longer. You can view my projects in the carousel displayed above!
